name: Frost Tank
notes: Winter Forge's Frostworks exclusive (not built at Fort Irongrad's Tank Plant) — the Heavy Tank roster's ice-themed control unit, tying into Winter Forge's Cold Turret/Ice Spire identity. Each hit has a 25% chance to freeze (full lockout for duration, no trailing debuff — distinct from stun, see game-design/05-troop-stat-schema.md's Status Effects section). Otherwise a mid-pack heavy tank: no damage modifiers, moderate stats across the board, cheapest and lightest Fuel upkeep of the heavy roster.
